scenes.why: Explaino-Vortex with rotational perturbation produces fractal flowers on escape-time-coloured cobalt background; ideal for demonstrating how a Newton-family kernel can produce Mandelbrot-like visual language

sidecars.notes: Classic z^3-1 Newton iteration over the same region; basin triangles contrast with vortex escape-time boundaries
Composed sine-of-square field; measures oscillatory interference at Newton convergence boundaries

scenes.why: Explaino-Rational-Escape deep in the real-axis arm at zoom ~14.6 with high max_iter (1200) and smooth_escape coloring produces an orbital globe texture unlike any other fractal in the catalog

sidecars.notes: exp(z^2+c) interference field; exponential growth rate at the rational-escape boundary reveals basin sensitivity
Absolute-value fold iteration; folds the complex plane onto the real axis and exposes hidden symmetry axes in the rational regime

scenes.why: Explaino-Joy with joy_coupling=0.668 and a tuned poly creates scalloped basin boundaries; the bold yellow-green vs purple colour field is the strongest visual case for joy_basins coloring

sidecars.notes: Mandelbrot-style z^2+c iteration at the joy-basin boundary shows how quadratic escape-time geometry overlaps Newton-convergence regions

scenes.why: Explaino-Phoenix with p=(0.4, -0.42) and complex polynomial produces bifurcated basin structure; the phoenix coupling creates memory-feedback orbits absent in pure Newton fractals

sidecars.notes: Classic Newton z^3-1 at the phoenix bifurcation location; reveals how memory-coupling flips convergence zones vs pure Newton
Conjugate-twist iteration; mixes anti-holomorphic feedback similar to phoenix memory but with purely geometric conjugation

scenes.why: Explaino-Dual with seed_b and mix interpolation active; two-seed blending is the canonical demo of the dual-polynomial sidecar mechanism that the fractal extensions PoC was built from

sidecars.notes: Newton z^3-1 as baseline over the dual-seed blend region; measures how much the dual blending departs from classical Newton basins
